args:
set -eu
measure_dir=$(mktemp -d)
measure_out=$(cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- measure prefill-path --out "$measure_dir")
printf '%s' "$measure_out" | grep -q 'measurement intent=prefill_path'
grep -q '"intent":"prefill_path"' "$measure_dir/measurement_report.json"
grep -q '"label":"broad_cold"' "$measure_dir/measurement_report.json"
grep -q '"label":"scoped_cold"' "$measure_dir/measurement_report.json"
grep -q '"label":"scoped_warm"' "$measure_dir/measurement_report.json"
grep -q '"phase_timings":' "$measure_dir/measurement_report.json"
grep -q '"changed_phases":' "$measure_dir/measurement_report.json"
grep -q '"replay_plan_identity":' "$measure_dir/measurement_report.json"
grep -q '"closure_outcome":' "$measure_dir/measurement_report.json"
grep -q '"duplicate_rank_local_compile_count":' "$measure_dir/measurement_report.json"
grep -q '"artifact_deserialization_ms":' "$measure_dir/scoped-warm/materialization_report.json"
grep -q '"reused_artifact_count":' "$measure_dir/scoped-warm/materialization_report.json"
printf 'measured\n'
